examples: Like the snowfields of Kilimanjaro and the ice in the Diamond Couloir, the Lewis Glacier is shrinking at an alarming rate because of global warming.
The pair had set out on a popular summer hike known as Le Couloir des Bossons near Mont Blanc - the Europe Union's highest peak.
The massif's two highest peaks, Nelion and Batian, rise to more than 17, 000 feet, with 1, 000-foot-vertical walls leading to their summits and the famous Diamond Couloir in between.
